subcodes.first_line: ...As to the Nineteen Day Feast, it rejoiceth mind and heart. If this feast be held in the proper fashion
subcodes.first_line_orig: ضیافت نوزده روزه بسیار سبب فرح و سرور قلوبست اگر چنانکه باید و شاید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Nineteen-Day Feast, @interpretation of dreams and visions
full_text_parts: As to the Nineteen Day Feast, it rejoiceth mind and heart. If this feast be held in the proper fashion, the friends will, once in nineteen days, find themselves spiritually restored, and endued with a power that is not of this world.
